articles.title: US Sen. Lindsey Graham has died after a brief and unexpected illness, his office says
articles.description:
The office did not provide any additional details about the South Carolina Republican, who was 71 years old.

The post US Sen. Lindsey Graham has died after a brief and unexpected illness, his office says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US Senator Lindsey Graham, 71, has died after a brief illness.
Graham's passing may impact Republican strategies in upcoming elections.
Local Boston officials express condolences, highlighting his influence on national policies.
